title: Entity Class Design
content: ## 1. Base Class Hierarchy
IEntity                              (Guid Id)
└── Entity : IEntity                 (concrete base — provides Id property)
└── TrackedEntity : Entity       (+ CreatedDate, CreatedById, UpdatedDate?, UpdatedById?)
└── [All Actions domain entities]
ITenantEntity                        (Guid TenantId)
└── Implemented by: most domain entities (RLS on every tenant-scoped table)
NOT implemented by: TenantConfiguration, Language, Translation, TranslationValue
ISoftDeletable                       (bool IsDeleted, DateTime? DeletedAt, Guid? DeletedById)
└── Implemented by: ActionEntity, ActionEvidence, ActionConsultation
IAuditable                           (marker interface for entities that record audit events)
└── Implemented by: ActionEntity
IVersioned                           (int Version — optimistic concurrency via ETag)
└── Implemented by: ActionEntity, ActionEvidence, ComplianceProfile, EscalationRule,
TenantConfiguration, DeadlineType
NOT implemented by: WorkflowDefinition (Version is admin-meaningful, not a concurrency token)
ITranslatedEntity<T>                 (ICollection<T> Translations)
where T : ITranslation
└── Implemented by: WorkflowDefinition, WorkflowState, ComplianceProfile, EscalationRule
ITranslation                         (string Name, string? Description, Guid LanguageId)
EntityTranslation : Entity, ITenantEntity, ITranslation
└── Base for: WorkflowDefinitionTranslation, WorkflowStateTranslation,
ComplianceProfileTranslation, EscalationRuleTranslation
Note: EntityTranslation inherits Entity (not TrackedEntity) per Language PRD.
Concrete translations are saved as child collections of tenant-scoped parents,
so they DO have a tenant_id column inherited from their parent's scope.
**Key decisions:**
- **Most domain entities inherit from `TrackedEntity`** for audit trail (CreatedDate, CreatedById, UpdatedDate?, UpdatedById?). Exceptions: Translation, TranslationValue inherit from `Entity` only.
- **Change tracking uses `AuditSaveChangesInterceptor`** — automatically sets CreatedDate/UpdatedDate and records field-level changes for auditable entities
- **`VersionIncrementInterceptor`** automatically increments `Version` on save for `IVersioned` entities
- **`ITenantEntity` uses `TenantId`** (not `OrganizationId`) because Actions is a downstream service that receives tenant context from JWT claims

- **RLS is enforced on all tenant-scoped tables** — no narrow boundary like Identity's 5-table approach. Global entities (Language, Translation, TranslationValue) and TenantConfiguration do not have RLS.
## 2. Entity Classification Table
| # | Entity Class | Inherits | ITenantEntity | ISoftDeletable | IAuditable | IVersioned | ITranslatedEntity | RLS |
| E1 | ActionEntity | TrackedEntity | Yes | Yes | Yes | Yes | No | Yes |
| E2 | ActionEvidence | TrackedEntity | Yes | Yes | No | Yes | No | Yes |
| E3 | ActionSourceLink | TrackedEntity | Yes | No | No | No | No | Yes |
| E4 | ActionStateHistory | TrackedEntity | Yes | No | No | No | No | Yes |
| E5 | ActionAuditEvent | TrackedEntity | Yes | No | No | No | No | Yes |
| E6 | ActionConsultation | TrackedEntity | Yes | Yes | No | No | No | Yes |
| E7 | RegulatoryDeadline | TrackedEntity | Yes | No | No | No | No | Yes |
| E8 | WorkflowDefinition | TrackedEntity | Yes | No | No | No | Yes | Yes |
| E9 | WorkflowState | TrackedEntity | Yes | No | No | No | Yes | Yes |
| E10 | WorkflowTransition | TrackedEntity | Yes | No | No | No | No | Yes |
| E11 | ComplianceProfile | TrackedEntity | Yes | No | No | Yes | Yes | Yes |
| E12 | EscalationRule | TrackedEntity | Yes | No | No | Yes | Yes | Yes |
| E13 | TenantSequence | TrackedEntity | Yes | No | No | No | No | Yes |
| E14 | Language | TrackedEntity | No | No | No | No | No | No |
| E15 | WorkflowDefinitionTranslation | EntityTranslation | Yes | No | No | No | N/A | Yes |
| E16 | WorkflowStateTranslation | EntityTranslation | Yes | No | No | No | N/A | Yes |
| E17 | ComplianceProfileTranslation | EntityTranslation | Yes | No | No | No | N/A | Yes |
| E18 | EscalationRuleTranslation | EntityTranslation | Yes | No | No | No | N/A | Yes |
| E19 | TenantConfiguration | TrackedEntity | No | No | Yes | Yes | No | No |
| E20 | DeadlineType | TrackedEntity | Yes | No | No | Yes | No | Yes |
| E21 | Translation | Entity | No | No | Yes | No | No | No |
| E22 | TranslationValue | Entity | No | No | No | No | No | No |
**Notes:**

- EntityTranslation inherits Entity (not TrackedEntity) per Language PRD. Concrete translations (E15-E18) have ITenantEntity=Yes and RLS=Yes because they inherit tenant_id from their parent entity's scope, even though the Language PRD describes EntityTranslation as "global". They are stored with tenant_id as an FK to their parent.
- WorkflowDefinition (E8) does NOT implement IVersioned. Its `Version` field is admin-meaningful (0 = draft, 1+ = published) and is not a concurrency token.
- ActionEvidence (E2) implements IVersioned for optimistic concurrency on soft-delete.
- Language (E14) is global — synced from Identity, platform-level, no TenantId, no RLS.
- TenantConfiguration (E19) has Id = Organization.Id from Identity. It is the FK anchor for all tenant-scoped tables but does not implement ITenantEntity.
- Translation (E21) and TranslationValue (E22) are global — no TenantId, no RLS.

**Totals:** 22 entities. 18 tracked (TrackedEntity), 2 entity-only (Entity). 18 implement ITenantEntity (E1-E13, E15-E18, E20). 18 have RLS policies. 3 soft-deletable. 2 auditable (ActionEntity, TenantConfiguration) + 1 (Translation with CreatedBy/UpdatedBy). 6 versioned. 4 translated (with 4 translation entities).
## 3. Class Diagram
See diagram `DIAG-CORE-ENTITY-CLASS-HIERARCHY` for the full mermaid class diagram.
## 4. Change Tracking Strategy
- **`CreatedDate` / `CreatedById`** set automatically by `AuditSaveChangesInterceptor` on insert
- **`UpdatedDate` / `UpdatedById`** set automatically by `AuditSaveChangesInterceptor` on update
- **`Version`** incremented automatically by `VersionIncrementInterceptor` on save for `IVersioned` entities
- **Field-level audit** for `IAuditable` entities: `AuditSaveChangesInterceptor` detects modified properties and records `ActionAuditEvent` entries with before/after values
- **State history** is explicitly recorded by `TransitionStateCommand` — not by the interceptor
This differs from Capstone's manual approach: Actions uses interceptors for consistent, automatic audit trail capture. This ensures no command can skip audit recording.
## 5. Column Naming Convention

Per **ADR-0016** (PascalCase Database Column Naming), EF Core's default PascalCase column naming is used with **no `.HasColumnName()` overrides**. Database column names match C# property names exactly.
| Layer | Convention | Example |
| C# properties | PascalCase | `CreatedDate`, `CreatedById`, `TenantId` |
| Database columns | PascalCase (matches C#) | `"CreatedDate"`, `"CreatedById"`, `"TenantId"` |
| Mapping | None — EF Core default | No `.HasColumnName()` calls |
The `TrackedEntity` base class properties map as:
| C# Property | DB Column |
| `CreatedDate` | `"CreatedDate"` |
| `CreatedById` | `"CreatedById"` |
| `UpdatedDate` | `"UpdatedDate"` |
| `UpdatedById` | `"UpdatedById"` |

> **Note:** PostgreSQL requires double-quoted identifiers for PascalCase column names in raw SQL and RLS policies (e.g., `WHERE "TenantId" = ...`). This is consistent with Capstone and Identity codebases.
